thread_title: 致歉：V2.4.0 轮换唤醒「群星闪耀时」调整 Apology: V2.4.0 Rotation Awakening “Galactic Light” Adjustment

content:
Had the Awakener and WoD been separate, I would've been tempted to try and go for an AA. But because this is a bullshit 50/50 banner, it's just not worth it at all. There's no way this decision now for half anni isn't just a betrayal of consumer trust. You've only just stabilized from EoS and you're consistently coming around to milk the fanbase? Read the room. It's just bad cashgrab decision after bad cashgrab decision for the last few patches.
The incentives to roll have never been higher, and simultaneously, the banners to roll on have never been more unappealing
